name: Mohawk Mobility LLC
service_types: NEMT, wheelchair-accessible medical transport, doctor appointments
districts_or_customers: West Valley Phoenix metro: Sun Cities, Surprise, Peoria, Glendale, Avondale, Goodyear, Buckeye, Wickenburg, West Phoenix; private-pay & medical clients
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified; small NEMT operator established 2008, still owner-operated as of recent listings.
fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. Pure non-emergency medical transport (NEMT) for adults/seniors; no school district contracts, no yellow buses, no SPED routing. Out of scope as a student-transportation tuck-in.

name: Care 4 Transportation LLC
service_types: NEMT (Medicaid-certified), wheelchair, stretcher, dialysis, hospital discharge, in-state/out-of-state medical transport
districts_or_customers: SC Medicaid recipients; medical/dialysis/rehab/dental clinics in Goose Creek / Charleston region
recent_news: Listed in SC PSC docket 2017-349-T (certificate of public convenience for NEMT). No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. Adult NEMT/Medicaid provider, not a school-bus contractor; no district contracts. Out of scope for student-transportation roll-up.

name: MITS of Virginia
owner_or_parent: independent (Mobility Transportation System of Virginia, Inc. / affiliated with MITS Corp.)
principals: Richard Baldwin (Dealer Operator / VP / General Manager)
service_types: Wheelchair van sales & conversions (VMI, Braun, FR Conversions, Bruno, etc.); mobility equipment dealer
districts_or_customers: Retail mobility-vehicle buyers across Virginia and West Virginia; dealer/service business not contracted transport
recent_news: No M&A activity identified; in business ~18+ years as a mobility dealer; VIADA member.
fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. This is a wheelchair/mobility van dealership (retail sales & conversions), NOT a transportation services operator. No school district contracts, no fleet operations. Out of scope - misclassified in source list.

name: Ultimate Care Transportation LLC
service_types: NEMT, wheelchair-accessible van transport, disabled persons transport
districts_or_customers: Southeast Michigan counties (Macomb, Wayne, Oakland); medical/disability clients; operating locations in Roseville and Hamtramck
recent_news: No M&A or expansion news identified; small owner-operated NEMT provider.
fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. Adult NEMT / disabled-persons transport with NPI registration (medical provider); no school-district yellow-bus contracts identified. Out of scope as a student-transport tuck-in.

name: Angel Wings Transportation Service LLC
service_types: NEMT (ambulatory/wheelchair/Geri-chair), dialysis, chemo, rehab, dental, pharmacy, adult day care, facility transfers, limousine/social events
districts_or_customers: Virginia Medicaid recipients and private-pay medical clients in Fredericksburg / Northern VA region

fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. Adult NEMT/Medicaid carrier with limousine sideline; no school-district contracts or SPED routing. Out of scope as a student-transport tuck-in. Note: source-list domain .org appears incorrect; actual operator site is angelwingstransport.net.
